# minio_batch_job (Resource)

Manages a MinIO batch job (replicate, expire, or keyrotate).

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "minio_batch_job" "expire" {
  job_type = "expire"
  job_yaml = <<-EOF
jobs:
  - name: expire-old-objects
    type: expire
    config:
      bucket: my-bucket
      prefix: temp/
      expire-days: 30
EOF
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `job_type` (String) Batch job type. One of `replicate`, `expire`, `keyrotate`.
- `job_yaml` (String) YAML job definition for the batch operation.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `job_id` (String) Assigned job ID returned by MinIO.
- `status` (String) Current job status string.
